task-registry.task: Initialize Vite + TypeScript + KAPLAY project with package.json
Create main.ts entry point with KAPLAY init and basic scene
Install icon package and verify dev server runs
Create title screen scene with styled menu
Implement scene transition system and New Game flow
Add game state initialization on New Game
Define Floor 1 room data (6 rooms with types and exits)
Create room scene with styled room display and exit buttons
Implement room-type visual differentiation (colors, icons)
Add fog of war and room discovery
Create combat scene with turn-based flow (Fight/Spells/Bag/Run)
Implement HP/mana bars and enemy representation
Add damage calculation, XP and crystal rewards
Create enemy data with 3+ distinct types
Implement combat resolution and return to room navigation
Create rune data (5 runes with elements/effects)
Build forge UI scene with rune selection and combination
Implement spell creation from rune combos (3+ valid combos)
Connect crafted spells to combat system with affinity tracking
Add enemy resistances and immunities system
Implement resource pressure (limited mana, forge costs)
Create encounters that require crafted spells to succeed
Create dialogue scene with NPC portrait and choice buttons
Add event rooms with tradeoff choices
Create persistent HUD (HP bar, mana bar, floor, tick, crystals)
Add overlay menus (Map, Bag, Spellbook, Stats/Traits)
Implement Traits UI label for narrative stats
Create Floor 2 with different mechanical constraints
Add boss encounters that gate floor progression
Extract content to JSON packs and implement save/load
Full game loop verification and softlock fixes
Write ARCHITECTURE.md and CONVENTIONS.md
Production build to game/dist/
